Lyrics.text:
Tsapako, Raiko ô,
Tsapako, tsapako
Ny fitiavanao ahy
Isan’andro ’zao.

Lyrics.label: ref
Lyrics.text:
Ka mangataka Aminao,
Omeo fo mahay mankasitraka.
‘Ty zanakao.
Mankasitraka, mankasitraka;
Ka misaotra Anao
Ray malala ô.
Ka mangataka Aminao,
Omeo fo mahay mankasitraka
‘Ty zanakao.

Iainako, iainako,
Iainako, eny
Ny fiarovanao
Manarona ny tenako

Tsinjoko, tsinjoko,
Tazako, hitako
‘Lay tany vao
Omenao hivantanako
